The Stylist

Meet Wissam

With more than 25 years behind the chair, Wissam brings a rare blend of international technique and personal artistry to every client. His focus is refined — hair cutting, coloring, and styling — executed with precision, movement, and texture.

Trained in Paris, London, New York, and Lebanon, Wissam has studied under the world's leading academies: Tony&Guy, Vidal Sassoon, and Alexander de Paris. He holds advanced certifications in Schwarzkopf, L'Oréal, Wella, and Matrix color systems, and completed intensive Kérastase training at the Paris headquarters.

A member of Haute Coiffure Française for over two decades, Wissam opened his first salon in Beirut in 1997 and brought his craft to Los Angeles in 2021.
